name: PATENT_EXISTS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Patent exists by targetpair. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name: $tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair,
       count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count,
       count(DISTINCT a) AS assignee_count,
       min(y.year) AS first_year,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name)[0..10] AS assignees

examples: Does CD3/CD70 have any published patents?
Does CD4/CD8A have any published patents?
Does CTLA4/IL6 have any published patents?
